vocab.example: Our client wants a new feature added to the dashboard.
vocab.example_vi: Khách hàng của chúng ta muốn thêm một tính năng mới vào dashboard.

vocab.example: Can you clarify the requirement for this feature?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể làm rõ yêu cầu cho tính năng này không?

vocab.example: This request is outside the scope of our current contract.
vocab.example_vi: Yêu cầu này nằm ngoài phạm vi hợp đồng hiện tại của chúng ta.

vocab.example: We received positive feedback from the client yesterday.
vocab.example_vi: Hôm qua chúng tôi nhận được phản hồi tích cực từ khách hàng.

vocab.example: I will send you a proposal for the new timeline.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ gửi bạn một đề xuất về lịch trình mới.

vocab.example: Let's make sure we understand the client's expectations clearly.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy chắc chắn chúng ta hiểu rõ kỳ vọng của khách hàng.

vocab.example: Can you confirm the meeting time for tomorrow?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn xác nhận giờ họp cho ngày mai được không?

vocab.example: This new feature might increase the budget a little.
vocab.example_vi: Tính năng mới này có thể làm tăng ngân sách một chút.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Good morning. Thank you for joining the call today.

lines.speaker: David (client)
lines.text: Good morning, Hoa. We want to discuss a new requirement for the dashboard.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Sure, please tell me more about your expectations.

lines.speaker: David (client)
lines.text: We want to add a chart that shows sales by region.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: I see. That is outside the scope of our current contract.

lines.speaker: David (client)
lines.text: I understand. Can you send us a proposal with the extra cost?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Of course. I will check with my team and confirm the budget by Friday.

lines.speaker: David (client)
lines.text: That sounds good. We really appreciate your quick feedback.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: No problem. We are happy to help with this new feature.

questions.q: What does the client want to add?
options: A chart showing sales by region

questions.q: Why can't Hoa add the feature immediately?
options: It is outside the scope of the contract

questions.q: What will Hoa send to the client?
options: A proposal with the extra cost

shadowing: Thank you so much for joining the call today, everyone.
We want to discuss a new requirement for the dashboard feature.
That is outside the scope of our current contract, unfortunately.
I will check with my team and confirm the budget by Friday.
We are happy to help with this new feature next quarter.
